segments.caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a studio set designed like a casual dining area, where a group of participants in white outfits are seated at tables, engaging in conversation and eating. The setting is bright and colorful, with a large screen in the background displaying animated graphics and Chinese text. The scene then cuts to a close-up of three participants in matching yellow tracksuits seated around a small table, labeled with numbers 1, 2, and 3. They are engaged in a game involving passing an object — a small white item — around the table while reciting a chant or rhyme, as indicated by the on-screen text '传递物品' (passing items) and '说对口令' (say the correct chant). The participants laugh and interact playfully, with one participant (number 1) passing the item to number 2, who then passes it to number 3, and so on. The camera alternates between close-ups of their expressions and wider shots showing the group’s reactions. The atmosphere is lighthearted and comedic, with animated graphics appearing on screen, including a cartoon depiction of a character labeled '导演' (director) with flames, and text like '质疑' (doubt) and '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), suggesting a humorous critique or commentary. The participants in white outfits, including a woman with a large bow in her hair and another with dark hair, react with amusement and mock seriousness, adding to the playful tone. The segment ends with a focus on the woman with dark hair, who appears to be leading the commentary, as indicated by the on-screen text '孟指导上线'.

segments.caption: The video opens with close-ups of the Woman with dark hair and the Woman with blonde hair and bow, both seated and reacting with expressive faces—surprise, amusement, and engagement—as they participate in a lively game or discussion. The scene quickly transitions to a wider shot revealing a group of Participants in white outfits seated at tables in a brightly lit studio set with a blue and white theme, featuring the 'Keep Running' logo and decorative elements like flowers and cartoon graphics. The atmosphere is playful and energetic, with participants laughing and interacting. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), takes a leading role, gesturing animatedly as she speaks, while the Woman with blonde hair and bow reacts with laughter and occasional commentary. The Participants in white outfits are seen eating and reacting to the game, with some standing up and moving around, indicating a dynamic, interactive segment. One participant in a white outfit stands and walks toward another, engaging in a playful exchange, while others continue to eat or gesture. The on-screen text graphics, such as '好喝' (delicious) and '安慕希' (a yogurt brand), appear intermittently, adding to the promotional and entertaining tone. The segment culminates in a humorous moment where a participant in a white outfit stands up and moves across the set, prompting reactions from others, including a man in a white shirt who appears to be the focus of a joke or challenge. The final frames show a blurred transition with text overlays like '一根鸭脖子' (a duck neck) and '一只小龙虾' (a lobster), suggesting a food-related game or challenge, possibly involving guessing or eating unusual items. The overall mood is light-hearted, comedic, and interactive, typical of a variety show format.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a close-up of three food items—'一碗莲藕汤' (a bowl of lotus root soup), '一根鸭脖子' (a duck neck), and '一只小龙虾' (a lobster)—displayed on a wooden board, setting up a game or challenge. The scene transitions to a studio setting with a light blue backdrop featuring the 'Keep Running' logo and cartoon elements. At the center, a man in a white shirt with a navy collar (Man in white shirt, center focus) is seated between two participants: a woman with dark hair in a white jacket (Woman with dark hair) and a man with dark hair in a white shirt. They are engaged in a playful exchange, passing a small white bowl and a red object, possibly a chili pepper, while on-screen text labels the bowl as '莲藕汤'. The Woman with dark hair gestures animatedly, appearing to lead the interaction, while the Man in white shirt reacts with surprise and amusement. The Woman with blonde hair and bow (Woman with blonde hair and bow) is visible in the background, laughing and reacting to the game. Other participants in white outfits (Participants in white outfits) are seated at surrounding tables, some eating and others watching, with one standing and moving toward the central table. The atmosphere is lighthearted and comedic, emphasized by animated text like '咋还演上了' (Why are you acting now?) and '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), suggesting a humorous critique. The camera cuts between close-ups of the participants' expressive faces and wider shots of the studio, capturing the dynamic interaction. The segment ends with the central trio still engaged, the bowl being passed back and forth, and the Woman with dark hair smiling broadly, while the Woman with blonde hair and bow continues to laugh, adding to the playful tone.

The on-screen text '正确动作演示' (Correct Action Demonstration) appears, suggesting a tutorial or comedic reenactment of the game. The atmosphere is lighthearted and humorous, with participants leaning in, making playful gestures, and engaging in mock competition. The red chili pepper remains a central prop, symbolizing the challenge, while the white bowl is passed back and forth, adding to the comedic tension. The setting remains consistent throughout, with no environmental changes, maintaining a cheerful and energetic tone.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a group of participants in white outfits seated at a table, engaging in a playful passing game involving a small white bowl and a red chili pepper. The central focus is on a man in a white shirt (center focus) who is seated between two other participants, one of whom is the Man with name tag '李晨' (Li Chen). The game involves passing the bowl and chili pepper in a specific order, as indicated by on-screen text '传递顺序' (Passing Order). As the game progresses, the man in the center reacts with exaggerated expressions of discomfort and laughter, particularly when the chili pepper is passed to him, prompting amusement from the surrounding participants. The Woman with blonde hair and bow, seated nearby, laughs heartily, while the Man with name tag '李晨' actively participates, passing the bowl and chili pepper with animated gestures. The atmosphere is lighthearted and comedic, with participants laughing and reacting to the game. A split-screen comparison appears, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), showing the man’s hands before and after the game, highlighting the messiness of the activity. The scene shifts to a wider view, revealing more participants in white outfits seated at tables in the background, some standing and moving around, adding to the dynamic and playful environment. The on-screen text 'Keep Running' and '安慕希' (Amul) are visible, indicating the show's branding and sponsorship. The segment concludes with the participants continuing to laugh and interact, emphasizing the fun and humorous nature of the challenge.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a lively game involving three men seated around a small wooden table in a brightly lit studio set designed to resemble a casual dining space, with a large 'Keep Running' logo in the background. The central figure, the Man in white shirt (center focus), is flanked by two other men, one of whom is identified by his name tag as '李晨' (Li Chen). They are engaged in a playful passing game involving a small white bowl labeled '莲藕汤' (Lotus Root Soup) and a bright red chili pepper. As the game progresses, the bowl and chili are passed rapidly between them, with exaggerated gestures and laughter. The Man in white shirt (center focus) reacts with mock distress and amusement as he receives the chili, while Li Chen and the other participant laugh heartily. The camera frequently cuts to overhead shots, emphasizing the circular motion of the passing game, and includes on-screen text like '小葫芦汤' (Little Gourd Soup) and '这是一个xiu~' (This is a xiu~) to add comedic commentary. The Woman with blonde hair and bow, seated nearby, watches with wide-eyed amusement and bursts into laughter, her reactions highlighted in close-ups. Other Participants in white outfits are visible in the background, some standing and interacting, contributing to the energetic atmosphere. The scene is punctuated by animated graphics, including a Split-Screen Comparison showing the man’s hands before and after the game, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), underscoring the messiness of the challenge. The overall tone is humorous and fast-paced, with the participants fully immersed in the playful chaos.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a lively game setting in a brightly lit studio decorated with blue and white tones, featuring a large backdrop with the 'Keep Running' logo and floral motifs. Participants in white outfits are seated at wooden tables, engaging in a playful challenge. The atmosphere is energetic, with laughter and animated gestures. A man in a white shirt (center focus) is seen reacting dramatically to a challenge, possibly involving a red chili pepper, as he leans back and laughs. The camera cuts to close-ups of his expressive face and hands, emphasizing his exaggerated discomfort. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), is actively speaking and gesturing, leading the commentary. The Woman with blonde hair and bow is seated nearby, laughing heartily at the man’s reactions. The scene shifts to a close-up of a table displaying a bowl of noodles labeled '一碗热干面' (a bowl of hot dry noodles), a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), and a boiled egg labeled '一颗水煮蛋' (a boiled egg), suggesting a humorous or symbolic game element. The Man with name tag '李晨' (Li Chen) interacts with the central figure, handing over the items. The participants in white outfits are seen moving around, standing, and engaging in playful banter, contributing to the dynamic environment. On-screen text graphics such as '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) appear, enhancing the comedic tone. The camera captures split-screen comparisons of the man’s hands before and after the game, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), highlighting the physical impact. The overall mood is light-hearted and entertaining, with participants fully immersed in the game.

segments.caption: The video segment unfolds in a brightly lit studio set designed to resemble a casual dining area, with a blue backdrop featuring the 'Keep Running' logo and stylized city silhouettes. The central focus is on a group of participants in white outfits seated at wooden tables, engaging in a playful passing game involving a small white bowl of hot dry noodles, a red chili pepper, a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), and a boiled egg. The Man in white shirt (center focus) reacts with exaggerated discomfort and laughter as he receives the red chili pepper, while the Man with name tag '李晨' actively participates by passing the bowl and chili. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), gestures animatedly, leading the commentary with expressive hand movements. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily, her amusement highlighted in close-up shots. On-screen text graphics such as '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) appear to narrate the game’s progression. A Split-Screen Comparison shows the man’s hands before and after the game, emphasizing the messiness. The atmosphere is lively and comedic, with participants in white outfits in the background reacting with laughter and movement, contributing to the energetic tone. The Plush Sword, Boiled Egg, and Bowl of Hot Dry Noodles remain central props, while the Red Chili Pepper is passed with dramatic flair. The setting remains consistent, with decorative elements like green plants and Chinese calligraphy banners adding to the thematic decor.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a lively game challenge in a brightly lit studio set, featuring the 'Keep Running' logo prominently displayed on a large screen in the background. The Participants in white outfits are seated at wooden tables, engaging in a passing game involving symbolic props. The Man in white shirt (center focus) is seated at the center table, reacting with exaggerated expressions as he participates in the challenge. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), is actively commenting and gesturing, leading the critique. The Woman with blonde hair and bow is seated next to the center table, laughing heartily at the man’s reactions. The game involves passing a Bowl of Hot Dry Noodles, a Plush Sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), a Boiled Egg, and a Red Chili Pepper, with on-screen text graphics like '热干面', '勾践剑', and '水煮蛋' appearing to narrate the action. The Split-Screen Comparison graphic shows the man’s hands before and after the game, emphasizing the messiness. As the challenge progresses, the scene shifts to a new round labeled '第三组挑战' (Third Group Challenge), introducing a new set of props: a green plush cactus labeled '一棵仙人掌' (a cactus), a white power bank labeled '一个充电宝' (a power bank), and a rolled dough stick labeled '一根擀面杖' (a rolling pin). The Man with name tag '李晨' (Li Chen) is seen actively passing the props, laughing and engaging with the central figure. The atmosphere remains playful and humorous, with animated on-screen text like '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) appearing to mark the end of a round. The Cartoon Director Character appears briefly with flames and a fan, labeled '质疑' (doubt), adding a comedic critique. The setting remains consistent with blue and white decor, potted plants, and promotional banners, maintaining a vibrant and energetic tone throughout.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a lively game challenge among participants seated at a wooden table in a brightly lit studio set with a blue backdrop featuring 'Keep Running' and promotional graphics. The Man in white shirt (center focus) is at the center of the action, reacting with exaggerated discomfort as he receives a white power bank from the Man with name tag '李晨', who is actively passing game items. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily, clearly amused by the man’s reactions. On-screen text graphics such as '充电宝' (power bank), '擀面杖' (rolling pin), and '仙人掌' (cactus) appear to label the props being passed. The game involves passing various objects — including a green plush cactus and a rolled dough stick — with the central figure showing animated expressions of surprise and pain, especially when handling the cactus. The atmosphere is playful and comedic, with participants in white outfits in the background reacting with laughter and gestures. At one point, the Man in white shirt (center focus) is shown with a close-up of his hands, emphasizing his involvement. The challenge culminates in a '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) graphic, followed by a transition to a scoreboard titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race), displaying distances like 1000m and 2000m, indicating progression in the game. The Woman with dark hair appears briefly, observing with a thoughtful expression, while the Man with name tag '李晨' continues to engage with the central figure, handing over props and laughing. The overall tone is energetic and humorous, with visual effects and text enhancing the comedic timing of the challenge.

active_entities.On-screen Text Graphics: Animated Chinese text such as '充电宝' (power bank), '擀面杖' (rolling pin), '仙人掌' (cactus), and '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful), used to narrate and emphasize the game and commentary, adding to the humorous tone.
active_entities.Green Plush Cactus: A green, cartoonish cactus with googly eyes, placed in a brown pot, labeled '一棵仙人掌' (a cactus), introduced as a new prop in the third challenge and actively passed between participants.
active_entities.White Power Bank: A white rectangular power bank with a green accent, labeled '一个充电宝' (a power bank), used as a new game item in the third challenge and passed between the Man with name tag '李晨' and the Man in white shirt (center focus).
active_entities.Rolled Dough Stick: A beige, cylindrical rolled dough stick, labeled '一根擀面杖' (a rolling pin), introduced as a new prop in the third challenge.
active_entities.Woman with dark hair: Wearing a white jacket with a name tag, she is actively speaking and gesturing, appearing to lead the commentary or critique, with on-screen text labeling her as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online).

discovered_new_entities.Scoreboard Graphic: A large on-screen graphic titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race), displaying numbered positions with distances like 1000m and 2000m, indicating the progression of the game or challenge.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a split-screen view: on the left, a large interactive scoreboard titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race) displays numbered positions (1–10) with some distances filled in (e.g., 1000m, 2000m, 3000m) and others marked with question marks. On the right, a man in a white shirt sits at a table, appearing to discuss or react to the game. The scene transitions to a wider shot where two men in white shirts stand beside the scoreboard, using a yellow measuring tape to mark distances on the board. One man places a pink flower sticker on position 1, then another on position 10, while the other man assists. The camera zooms in on the scoreboard as the men reveal distances: position 1 is 500m, position 10 is 1000m. A graphic overlay appears, summarizing the known segments: 500m × 1, 1000m × 1, 1500m × 2. The final frame shows a full-screen graphic titled '《奔跑吧》13公里马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running 13km Marathon Relay Race), listing the 10 legs with known distances (e.g., 500m, 1000m, 2000m, 3000m) and question marks for unknowns. The atmosphere is playful and game-like, with bright lighting and colorful set design featuring food-themed posters in the background.

active_entities.Scoreboard Graphic: A large on-screen graphic titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race), displaying numbered positions (1–10) with distances like 1000m, 2000m, 3000m, and question marks for unknowns; it is interacted with by two men using a measuring tape and flower stickers to reveal distances.
active_entities.Man in white shirt (center focus): A man in a white shirt seated at a table, initially seen reacting to the game, later standing beside the scoreboard and participating in marking distances with a measuring tape and flower stickers.
active_entities.Participants in white outfits: A group of individuals in white clothing, including two men actively engaging with the scoreboard, using a yellow measuring tape and placing flower stickers to reveal distances; they are focused and collaborative in their task.
active_entities.On-screen Text Graphics: Animated Chinese text such as '第1棒 500米' (Leg 1: 500m), '第10棒 1000米' (Leg 10: 1000m), and a summary graphic '未知赛段 500米×1, 1000米×1, 1500米×2' (Unknown Segments: 500m×1, 1000m×1, 1500m×2), used to narrate the revealed distances and progress of the relay race.

discovered_new_entities.Yellow Measuring Tape: A long, flexible yellow tape used by the two men to measure and mark distances on the scoreboard, serving as a physical tool to reveal the lengths of each relay leg.
discovered_new_entities.Pink Flower Stickers: Decorative pink flower-shaped stickers placed on the scoreboard at positions 1 and 10 to indicate the revealed distances of 500m and 1000m, respectively, adding a playful visual element to the game.
discovered_new_entities.Full-Screen Relay Race Graphic: A large, detailed graphic titled '《奔跑吧》13公里马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running 13km Marathon Relay Race), listing all 10 legs with known distances (e.g., 500m, 1000m, 2000m, 3000m) and question marks for unknowns, providing a comprehensive overview of the relay structure.
